examples.title: Pseudocode: Trim Method
examples.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from a string
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Trim
INPUT: inputString
OUTPUT: trimmedString

BEGIN
 WHILE inputString starts with whitespace
 REMOVE leading whitespace from inputString
 END WHILE
 WHILE inputString ends with whitespace
 REMOVE trailing whitespace from inputString
 END WHILE
 RETURN inputString
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the trim algorithm
